deleteNotifierConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this notifier? This action cannot be undone.
transferNotifierDescription: Transfer this notifier to another workspace
thisNotifierIsUsedBySomeDatabases: This notifier is used by some databases. Please transfer or remove related databases first.
selectAWorkspaceToTransferThisNotifierTo: Select a workspace to transfer this notifier to.
notifierIsUsedBySomeDatabasesRemoveFirst: Notifier is used by some databases. Please remove notifier from databases first.
notifierIsUsedByDatabases: Notifier is used by some databases. Please remove notifier from databases first.
sendTestNotificationHint: send test notification via button below (even if you updated settings)
waitNextNotification: wait until next notification is sent without errors
sendTestNotificationViaButtonBelow: send test notification via button below (even if you updated settings);
waitUntilNextNotificationSentWithoutErro: wait until next notification is sent without errors;
areYouSureToRemoveThisNotifier: Are you sure you want to remove this notifier? This action cannot be undone.
notifierIsAPlaceWhereNotificationsWillBe: Notifier - is a place where notifications will be sent (email, Slack, Telegram, etc.)
name: Name
makeSureChannelIsPublicOrBotIsAddedToPri: Make sure channel is public or bot is added to private channel (via @invite) or group. For direct messages use User ID from Slack profile.
theEmailWhereYouWantToReceiveMessage: The email where you want to receive the message
optionalEmailAddressToUseAsSender: Optional. Email address to use as sender. If empty, will use SMTP user or auto-generate from host
howToGetTelegramBotApiToken: How to get Telegram bot API token?
theChatWhereYouWantToReceiveMessage: The chat where you want to receive the message (it can be your private chat or a group)
howToGetTelegramChatId: How to get Telegram chat ID?
toGetYourChatId: To get your chat ID, message
makeSureYouStartedChatWithBot: Make sure you started chat with the bot
ifYouWantToGetChatIdOfAGroup: If you want to get chat ID of a group, add your bot with
toGroupAndWriteStart: to group and write /start (you will see chat ID)
enableThisToSendMessagesToASpecificThrea: Enable this to send messages to a specific thread in a group chat
theIdOfThreadWhereMessagesShouldBeSent: The ID of thread where messages should be sent
toGetThreadId: To get thread ID, go to thread in your Telegram group, tap on the thread name at the top, then tap "Thread Info". Copy the thread link and take the last number from the URL.
threadFunctionalityOnlyWorksInGroupChats: Thread functionality only works in group chats, not in private chats.
howToGetDiscordWebhookUrl: How to get Discord webhook URL:
createOrSelectADiscordChannel: 1. Create or select a Discord channel
noteMakeSureMakeChannelPrivateIfNeeded: Note: make sure make channel private if needed
httpEndpointFromYourPowerAutomateFlow: HTTP endpoint from your Power Automate flow (When an HTTP request is received)
addCustomHttpHeadersToWebhookRequest: Add custom HTTP headers to webhook request (e.g., Authorization, X-API-Key)
howToConnectSlack: How to connect Slack (how to get bot token and chat ID)?
